payment.heading: Payment
payment.note: Pay before your session. Venmo preferred — PayPal charges a transaction fee.

items.question: What platform do sessions happen on?
items.answer: Video call (Zoom or Google Meet) while sharing a board on Lichess or Chess.com.

items.question: What skill level is this for?
items.answer: All levels welcome. Sessions are tailored to where you are and where you want to go.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: Just yourself. A few recent games to review is a bonus but not required.

items.question: Can I reschedule?
items.answer: Yes. Reschedule or cancel through Cal.com up to 24 hours before your session.
